scripts.prepare:entrypoint:mainnet: mustache config/entrypoint/networks/mainnet.json config/entrypoint/subgraph.template.yaml > subgraph.yaml && mustache config/entrypoint/networks/mainnet.json config/entrypoint/constants.template.ts > src/constants/static.ts && mustache config/entrypoint/metadata.json config/entrypoint/pipeline.template.yaml > royco-day-entrypoint-pipeline.yaml
scripts.build: npm run prepare:entrypoint:mainnet && npm run codegen && graph build
scripts.test: npm run prepare:entrypoint:mainnet && npm run codegen && graph test -v 0.6.0
